default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and workflow optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy focuses on high-volume AI-generated articles with human review, testing various topics and ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Team to shift focus: review high-performing content (2+ months old) instead of all new posts](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [GrowthX to take on more responsibility for content refreshes, freeing up Arena team's time](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Andrej (new team member) will enhance quality assurance and strategic content planning](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Experimenting with 10-15 pieces/week + 5 content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Testing ICP variations and topics at scale](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Deleting low-performing content after 8-16 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Recent test: 5 articles improved from 250 to 1,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Current: Paula reviews all new content for basic SEO elements](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Proposed: Wait 2 months, then review only high-performing articles (reduces workload by \~90%)](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Arena team to focus on writing premium, brand-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)

### Content Refresh Workflow

  - [\~200 older articles (12+ months) need updating](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [GrowthX to take on 100 content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Arena team can add URLs to content refresh list if capacity allows](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### SEO Improvements

  - [Need to diversify topics and avoid repetition (e.g., multiple similar social media posts)](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focus on timely topics: social media vs. owned communities, Twitter alternatives, TikTok in US](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Quality Assurance

  - [Andrej to lead thorough human checks on AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Will improve strategic planning and reduce keyword repetition](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Arena team to internally discuss new content review strategy (70% AI, wait 1-2 months, then refine)](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin taking on content refreshes for older articles](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Andrej to implement enhanced quality assurance process](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Arena team to focus on creating premium, brand-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing high-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/syAKz91f-fA5WebT5rvynaGB1Hr3ybQV?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

action_items.description: RingMath to determine 'underperforming' threshold based on impressions and clicks, and wait 2 months to review underperforming content
fwd.digital to take over refreshing 200+ old content pages while Paola focuses on creating new brand content
